articles.author: Mike Allen
articles.title: Trump: U.S. stake in AI giants "could be a beautiful thing" - Axios
articles.description: "There's something very interesting about it, where it almost becomes a partnership with the American public."
articles.content:
• Of course, industry advocates of the idea would favor giving up much less for an AI public wealth fund 1-5% stakes have been kicked around.
Between the lines: AI is broadly unpopular… [+1264 chars]
